ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR NOTICE OF INTENTION TO ISSUE AMENDED AND CORRECTED JUDGMENT AND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING SET FOR MAY-28-2010 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
ORDER FOR AMENDED JUDGMENT RE: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING OF MAY 28, 2010
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING OF MAY-28-2010 - AMENDED JUDGMENT ISSUED. NO APPEARANCES BY EITHER PARTY. JUDGE JAMES J. MCBRIDE, CLERK SHAWNA VANTREE, REPORTER RITA HOWELL (206).
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FRAZIER, CHRISTOPHER
ORDER TO RECALL THE WRIT OF EXECUTION SENT TO S.F. SHERIFF DEPT. & MAILED TO ALL PARTIES.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO PLAINTIFF CASHCALL, INC., RETURNED "ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN/UNABLE TO FORWARD".
ORDER TO RECALL THE WRIT OF EXECUTION SUBMITTED TO COMMISSIONER TO SIGN.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CASHCALL, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FRAZIER, CHRISTOPHER $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $165.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,665.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $2,680.00 AS TO DEFENDANT FRAZIER, CHRISTOPHER
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT FRAZIER, CHRISTOPHER
CERTIFICATE OF SERVICE BY MAIL RE: ISSUANCE OF AMENDED JUDGMENT MAILED TO CASHCALL, INC., RETURNED "ADDRESS UNDELIVERED/UNABLE TO FORWARD".
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY CASHCALL, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT FRAZIER, CHRISTOPHER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-10-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
